title: F-Tech: Robots
description: Introducing "F-Tech: Robots" - the revolutionary Minecraft Fabric mod that brings the power of building robots to your fingertips!
body:
![Logo](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/f-tech/robots/logo.png) ![Banner](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/f-tech/robots/robot_left_right_gif.gif)

Introducing "F-Tech: Robots" - the revolutionary Minecraft Fabric mod that brings the power of advanced robotics to your fingertips! Imagine having an army of tireless, efficient robots at your command, ready to transform your world like never before. With "F-Tech: Robots", you can harness the incredible capabilities of these futuristic machines to automate your building projects. Simply designate a cubic area, choose your desired block, and watch in awe as your robots clear or fill the space with lightning speed and precision. But that's not all - these intelligent robots can also construct intricate Create mod schematics, bringing your most ambitious designs to life effortlessly. Need to connect distant parts of your world? "F-Tech: Robots" has you covered. Command your robots to build railways from point A to point B, and marvel as they automatically design and construct bridges, tunnels, embankments, and cuttings to seamlessly navigate any terrain. The best part? Your robots and their controller are automatically chunk-loaded, meaning they can build anywhere in your world, even when you're far away from your base. And with the innovative 'provider chest' system, you can easily supply your robots with an endless stream of building materials, integrating seamlessly with your existing automation setups. Get ready to experience Minecraft like never before with "F-Tech: Robots". Unleash the power of the future and let your creativity soar to new heights! ## 💛 Additional thanks to 💛 - Matej - Artist - Automatone for pathfinding (which I forked and is used as a Jar-in-Jar lib) - magistermaks - SimpleConfig (Used in F-Tech: Core) - Additional sound effects from zapsplat.com
